## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My commits are focused and follow our message conventions
- [ ] I added/updated tests where relevant
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check` and `cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings` pass (Rust)
- [ ] `go fmt ./...`, `go vet ./...`, `go test ./...` pass (Go)
- [ ] Every new source file has an SPDX license header
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `## [Unreleased]` if user-facing
